name: lodestar
description: Project-level goal-orientation, anti-drift, and lightweight domain-modeling system for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Codex anchored to project goals, domain language, and next actions.
interface.longDescription: Lodestar provides a project-local .lodestar/ anchor, lightweight domain map, GAP ledger, and opt-in lifecycle hooks for session start, tool use, compaction, subagents, and stop handoffs.
defaultPrompt: Use Lodestar to clarify this project's current goal and next action.
Use Lodestar to check whether we are drifting from the active goal.
